name: Toasted Orzo Salad
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Nicoise olives, halved and pitted
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. Toss half of the orzo with 1 tablespoon olive oil. Spread on a cookie sheet and toast in the oven for just a few minutes, or until lightly browned.
3. Cook the toasted and untoasted orzo in boiling salted water for 10 minutes. Remove from heat, rinse, and drain.
4. In a large mixing bowl, add all remaining ingredients and mix well. Cover and refrigerate until 1 hour before serving.
